controls: the adapter can open only the immutable O1C-0003 snapshot and verifies its finalized capsule manifest first
TRAIN, CALIBRATION and SEALED_DEPLOYMENT are distinct roles; A349 label access is structurally unavailable
all 13 channels and horizons 1,2,4,8 must cover exactly 256 cells per slice
the 133-to-532 transform and name hashes are generated by lab code rather than copied from an executable sibling module
A348 and A349 orders are materialized before the A348 calibration label is opened
progress, recovery, result and prospective-outcome members are denied before every read
no sibling repository is read or written by this attempt
config.hypothesis: A lab-owned implementation can reconstruct the frozen 133-to-532 temporal/XOR geometry and the A342 two-view score from the immutable O1C-0003 snapshot, reproducing the A348 and still-target-blind A349 score and order commitments exactly.
config.next_action: Freeze label-free Walsh/O1 spectral banks on the A348 score-field geometry, persist complete A349 compressed orders, and compare field/order fidelity without opening any A349 outcome.
config.prediction: All 52 A272/A348/A349 measurement shards will pass their role and provenance gates; both feature-name hashes, the frozen model hash, the A348 pair score/order hashes, and the A349 pair score/order hashes will match their precommitted values without reading an A349 label, progress file, result file, or sibling path.
